“你喜欢这个游戏吗？”
“既然喜欢的话，就来陪我玩一个新的游戏吧，获胜的人可以获得前往新世界的权利，并且将拥有永久的寿命。”
“但是，只有前三名可以得到这些权利。”
“什么？你问我这个游戏叫什么名字？这个游戏，就叫做《新世界OL》！”
就这样，十二人之间的生存游戏即将上演。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/6edb0001ba2bc77db338~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"在下棋","author_id":"","book_id":"6488865428461325325","book_name":"新世界OL","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#081840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6507593470352294414","read_count":"26","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1999982"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"667","tags":"游戏体育","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/6edb0001ba2bc77db338~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435650&x-signature=%2B9pI7a39d%2F77htksUgCw2v7qC2Y%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":4,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":18710,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":18710,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":2509},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6868263190661971971","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错不错，歪瑞古德"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1599142146,"group_id":"6488865428461325325","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我还没想好怎么介绍自己。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwfZTWyIaVcVZditoO7OP4FTumdBNcq3Rye+qUuuiJSt","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a43316a51258423b951b425042ec89ee~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9
